title: [M3] Track @hono/node-server advisory GHSA-92pp-h63x-v22m
description: Path-traversal in serveStatic via repeated slashes. Pulled in transitively as prisma → @prisma/dev → @hono/node-server@<1.19.13. @prisma/dev powers prisma studio / prisma dev — dev-only surface, not loaded by @prisma/client at runtime. Production hosts (only run prisma migrate deploy) not exposed. Periodically re-run cd backend && npm audit and bump prisma / @prisma/client / @prisma/adapter-pg together when clean version available. Do NOT take 'npm audit fix --force' — proposes prisma@6.19.3, a major-version downgrade. Close when audit advisory disappears without downgrade, or when underlying advisory is withdrawn.
notes:
verify: cd backend && bash -c 'npm audit --omit=dev --json 2>/dev/null | jq ".vulnerabilities | to_entries | map(select(.value.via[] | type==\"object\" and .source==1107173)) | length"' | tee /tmp/x21-count && [ "$(cat /tmp/x21-count)" = "0" ]
ref: TASKS.md [M3] (was X21) (backlog next)

title: [M2] Finish act() warning sweep in frontend tests
description: X15 was ticked but verbose run still emits 60 'An update to <Component> inside a test was not wrapped in act(...)' lines across 9 files: AppShell, ChatComposer, ChatPanel, InlineAIResult, ModelPicker, SelectionBubble, Settings.appearance, Settings.models, Sidebar. Two root causes: (a) TanStack Query settle-after-test — useUserSettingsQuery resolves and fires setSizeDraft/setTweaks etc. inside seed useEffects after test last await returns; fix per-test by waitFor or settle-helper in tests/setup.ts; (b) Zustand setState from outside React combined with useLayoutEffect-driven re-positioning (SelectionBubble.tsx:157). X15 fix pattern (await userEvent.click / await screen.findBy / await waitFor) is correct — apply consistently.
notes:
verify: cd frontend && bash -c 'npm run test:frontend -- --run --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | grep -c "not wrapped in act"' | tee /tmp/act-count && [ "$(cat /tmp/act-count)" = "0" ]
ref: TASKS.md [M2] (was X20) (backlog next)

title: [M1] Resolve pg@8 client.query DeprecationWarning
description: Backend npm test and venice:probe emit 'DeprecationWarning: Calling client.query() when the client is already executing a query' once per process under X13 Prisma 7 + @prisma/adapter-pg migration. node-postgres reusing a single Client for overlapping queries inside Prisma $transaction. Resolution paths: (1) wait for @prisma/adapter-pg release using pg.Pool-per-statement; (2) bump pg@^9 if Prisma adapter peer-declares it; (3) if neither lands within ~6 weeks, file upstream issue with minimal repro and add scoped process.removeAllListeners('warning') filter for that exact code. Do NOT add global node-warning silencer in tests.
notes:
verify: cd backend && npm test 2>&1 | tee /tmp/backend-test.log && ! grep -q 'client.query() when the client is already executing' /tmp/backend-test.log
ref: TASKS.md [M1] (was X16) (backlog next)

title: [X28] Settings → Models per-model parameter persistence
description: (1) Audit UI defaults — confirm temperature/top_p/max_tokens etc. are sane for general writing. (2) Parameter changes must persist per model (today applied globally); saved settings shape becomes { [modelId]: { temperature, ... } } keyed by Venice model ID. (3) Per-model Reset button clears user overrides for that model and falls back to model defaults. (4) Some Venice models expose default param values via /models endpoint — load as baseline defaults instead of global hardcode.
notes: ref: TASKS.md [X28] (backlog next, no verify yet)

title: [X30] @-mention character picker always shows 'No characters'
description: @-mention character picker inside editor always shows 'No characters in this story yet.' even when story has characters. Suspected timing/provider-registration race in frontend/src/lib/charRefSuggestion.ts + frontend/src/hooks/useCharRefSuggestionProvider.ts + frontend/src/components/Paper.tsx. Suggestion extension created with module-level provider callback; Paper registers in mount effect; useCharactersQuery resolves later. Investigation: (1) reproduce with ≥1 character; (2) confirm useCharactersQuery resolves; (3) decide between deferring suggestion init, passing chars through TipTap config, or re-triggering menu when provider/data appears.
notes:
verify: TBD — write tests/components/CharRefSuggestion.test.tsx that mounts Paper with seeded characters and asserts menu shows them on @
ref: TASKS.md [X30] (backlog next)

title: Migrate verify: lines from TASKS.md into bd, retire /task-verify dependency on TASKS.md
description: Path-3 migration follow-up. Today /task-verify (.claude/skills/task-verify/) and the auto-tick hook (.claude/hooks/pre-tasks-edit.sh) both read verify: from TASKS.md. Once all live TASKS.md sections (F Phase 4, X, M, DS) are closed or migrated, replace this with a bd-aware variant: skill reads verify: from `bd show <id>` notes, hook is retired (or repurposed to gate `bd close` instead of `[x]`). Then TASKS.md collapses to a pure historical archive index (pointing at docs/done/done-*.md). Don't do this prematurely — the existing skill+hook gate still has real value and bd doesn't replicate it yet. Open this when (a) all 20 seeded bd issues either have verify: in their bd notes or are closed, and (b) no live TASKS.md sections remain.
notes:
Trigger: zero remaining open [ ] rows in TASKS.md live sections (F Phase 4, X, M, DS).
Scope: rewrite .claude/skills/task-verify/run.sh to extract verify: from `bd show <id> --json` instead of TASKS.md; decide fate of pre-tasks-edit.sh (retire vs port to bd close); delete or archive TASKS.md live sections; update CLAUDE.md Task Completion Protocol to remove the dual-tick coordination.

title: [X11] Reconsider enable_web_search on /api/ai/complete
description: V7 wired web-search opt-in. V26 scoped citations to chat panel only, so on inline-AI surface users pay Venice web-search cost with zero user-visible benefit (citations dropped silently). Decide: (a) turn web search OFF for all inline AI (simplest); (b) keep ON as silent fact-grounding nudge (tolerable but undocumented); (c) extend V26 delivery to inline AI (requires F-design for sources UI on inline card). Write decision into docs/venice-integration.md § Web Search. If (a), remove enableWebSearch from ai.routes.ts body schema + update docs/api-contract.md.
notes:
verify: design decision — no automated verify
ref: TASKS.md [X11] (proposed - no plan)

title: [X34] Venice call observability
description: AI/chat routes only console.error on failure — zero log line for successful Venice call, so smoke-tests cannot confirm what was sent. Recommendation: dev-only one-line console.log in ai.routes.ts + chat.routes.ts before client.chat.completions.create printing { userId, modelId, action, max_completion_tokens, model_cap, user_setting, enable_web_search }, gated on NODE_ENV !== 'production'. Optionally add x-debug-* response headers opportunistically. Defer pino/structured logger until needed. MUST NOT log decrypted Venice key, decrypted narrative content, or assembled messages array.
notes: ref: TASKS.md [X34] (recently added, no verify yet)
